events.description: segment opens, title text 'branches get interesting' fades in with slide up
misconception folder icon appears with slide up — represents 'copy of code'
red X mark scales in over folder, crossing out the misconception — dramatic rejection
branch file card slides in from below — key revelation that branch is just a text file
hash text 'a1b2c3d4e5f6...' appears inside the file card
scene 1 crossfades out, scene 2 fades in
'That's it.' text scales up dramatically with spring animation — emphasis moment
scene 2 crossfades out, scene 3 with branch creation fades in
'main' branch file card appears in scene 3 with .git/refs/heads/ header
'feature' branch file card slides in next to main — new branch created
'40 bytes' size labels pop in under both cards with spring scale — emphasizes tiny size
HEAD pointer badge appears above main branch card
HEAD pointer smoothly slides from main card to feature card — visualizes branch switching
final glow emphasis on branch files, segment ending
